title: Look-Before-Move: Narrative-Grounded World Visual Attention in Dynamic 3D Story Worlds
abstract: arXiv:2606.26964v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: As embodied AI and world models increasingly operate in dynamic 3D environments, visual perception must move beyond passively interpreting given observations toward actively deciding what to observe. We study this problem through camera planning in dynamic 3D story worlds, where the camera must not only generate smooth motion, but also decide what visual evidence should be acquired before it moves. We formulate this capability as Narrative-Grounded World Visual Attention, where the camera acts as an embodied observer that determines what to observe, how to compose the observation, and how to shift attention over time under narrative intent and physical 3D constraints. To realize this capability, we propose Look-Before-Move, a camera planning framework that separates observation specification from motion execution. It first builds a Semantic Observation Contract to convert directorial intent into executable visual constraints, then perfor

translated_title: 先看再动：动态3D故事世界中的叙事引导型视觉注意力机制
translated_abstract: 随着具身AI和世界模型在动态3D环境中的广泛应用，视觉感知必须从被动解读已有观察，转向主动决定观察什么。我们通过动态3D故事世界中的摄像机规划来研究这一问题，摄像机不仅要生成平滑的运动，还要在移动之前决定应该获取哪些视觉证据。我们将这一能力定义为“叙事引导型世界视觉注意力”，其中摄像机作为一个具身观察者，决定观察什么、如何构图观察内容、以及如何在叙事意图和物理3D约束下随时间调整注意力焦点。为实现这一能力，我们提出了“先看再动”摄像机规划框架，它将观察规范与运动执行分离。该框架首先构建一个“语义观察合约”，将导演意图转化为可执行的视觉约束，然后据此执行运动。
tldr: 提出一种“先看再动”的摄像机规划框架，通过将观察规范与运动执行分离，使动态3D故事世界中的具身观察者能在叙事引导下主动决定观察内容和注意力转移方式。
en_tdlr: We propose a "Look-Before-Move" camera planning framework that separates observation specification from motion execution, enabling embodied observers in dynamic 3D story worlds to actively decide what to observe and how to shift attention under narrative guidance.
